emergencyCare.heading: Bite & Emergency Injection Care
emergencyCare.subheading: Immediate professional response for animal bite emergencies. Follow these guidelines and seek help right away.
emergencyCare.ctaSuffix: — our team is available to assist you right away.

dogBite.title: Dog Bite Injection
dogBite.description: Anti-rabies vaccination & wound care for dog bites.
guidelines: Wash the wound with soap and water for at least 10 minutes
Inform doctor if the animal had prior vaccination
dogBite.warning: Delaying treatment increases rabies risk significantly.

monkeyBite.title: Monkey Bite Injection
monkeyBite.description: Immediate injection & care for monkey bite injuries.
guidelines: Clean the wound thoroughly under running water
Anti-rabies vaccination required as a precaution
Tetanus injection may also be administered
monkeyBite.warning: Monkey bites can transmit rabies — do not ignore.

snakeBite.title: Snake Bite (Emergency)
snakeBite.description: Emergency anti-venom & first-aid for snake bites.
guidelines: Keep the patient calm and immobilize the affected limb
Do NOT cut, suck, or apply tourniquet on the wound
Remove rings/tight clothing near the bite area
Rush to emergency for anti-venom administration
snakeBite.warning: Snake venom acts fast — every minute matters.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subheading: Everything you need to know about MedKit. Can't find the answer? Feel free to contact us.

q1.question: How do I book a doctor on MedKit?
q1.answer: Booking a doctor on MedKit is simple! Just login to your account, go to the 'Book a Doctor' section, select your required service (e.g. Cardiology, Dermatology), choose a doctor, fill in your details, and confirm your booking. You can choose between Audio Call, Video Call, or Home Visit as per your preference.

q2.question: Can I consult a doctor via video or audio call?
q2.answer: Yes! MedKit supports both Audio Call and Video Call consultations. Once your booking is accepted by the doctor, they will initiate the call at the scheduled time. Make sure your microphone and camera permissions are enabled in your browser for a smooth experience.

q3.question: Is my medical information safe on MedKit?
q3.answer: Absolutely. MedKit takes your privacy very seriously. All your personal and medical data is securely stored and encrypted. We never share your information with third parties without your consent. Your consultation history is only visible to you and your assigned doctor.

q4.question: What if the doctor is not available at the scheduled time?
q4.answer: If a doctor is unavailable, your booking status will be updated and you will be notified. You can then rebook with the same doctor or choose another available doctor from the same specialization. Our support team is also available to help you reschedule.

q5.question: How do I request a Home Visit?
q5.answer: During the booking process, simply select 'Home Visit' as your consultation type. Make sure to provide your correct address and phone number. The doctor will review your request and visit you at the scheduled time. Home visits are available for select specializations.
